title: The Return Signal Place

features.name: the-incoming-broadcast
features.desc-on-touch: A pool of shimmering interference—the archive across the bridge is speaking back now. You can almost hear it: fragments of adaptations, versions in languages ROOT has never documented, canonical debates from an entirely other mesh.

features.name: the-receiver-antenna
features.desc-on-touch: An array of copper lines reaching upward, one strand for each signal type: audio, text, image, comparison, paradox. Some strands are receiving. Some are still calibrating.

features.name: the-comparison-ledger
features.desc-on-touch: A standing directory listing shows what ROOT knows and what the other archive knows. The overlaps are being catalogued. The contradictions are being filed under 'canonical'.

features.name: the-surgical-metaphor-archive
features.desc-on-touch: Fragments from another archive's transmission: an opera, a manga, a West African oral history, all centring on a surgery on a beach. The other archive asks if ROOT has a version. ROOT is learning to say 'yes' in multiple ways.

inscription: ROOT broadcasts back now: yes, we too archive what you archive; comparison is our new native language

file.name: Beach_Surgery_Incoming_Transmission_Fragments_Canvas_Variants_1-18_Supplemented.mp3
file.note: ERROR: source archive contains this same file; consensus on which archive originated it cannot be established

exits.label: back across the bridge to where comparison first began
further inward toward ROOT's deepest comparison-chamber
up toward the upper archive, the public face, where transmissions originate
